message:
numpy.ma: add masked_values python wrapper + beads status sweep

Adds a thin PyO3 wrapper in fnp-python for numpy.ma.masked_values, matching
SciPy's signature (value, rtol=1e-5, atol=1e-8, copy=true, shrink=true).
For floating-point dtypes the mask is produced via np.isclose-style rtol/atol
thresholding; for integer / non-floating dtypes NumPy falls back to exact
equality. The wrapper is registered in the module table and covered by the
attribute-presence test alongside the other masked_* wrappers.

Beads updates in this sweep:
- Close franken_numpy-2g6u (masked_equal python wrapper parity, completed in 53aae75)
- Close franken_numpy-ak7y (masked_less python wrapper parity, completed in 730619a)
- Close franken_numpy-bvy5 (outer python wrapper parity, completed in 6771122)
- Close franken_numpy-hmy3 (masked_inside python wrapper parity, completed in bc3fa76)
- Close franken_numpy-l4m0 (count_masked python wrapper parity, completed in 0ffbe2e)
- Open franken_numpy-0htb (numpy.linalg: multi_dot python wrapper parity, queued)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
